name: Royalty
description:
You have descended into an intimate amphitheatre of abandon where
exhibitionists and voyeurs are welcome (and encouraged) to play. Far above you, a large crack in the domed ceiling reveals a myriad of dark constellations. 
The morning star winks mischieveously on the horizon.  A low stage, covered
with soft, luxurious cushions, is surrounded by a reviewing stand rising
above it on all sides.  The stands are padded and cozy, allowing watchers to
lounge or indulge themselves in the shadows.  The stage is surrounded by
soft, low candlelights, the players move slow to the music. Two large thrones
sit at the front of the stage for the King and his Queen to view the
scenes.
